title: Comment
description: Comment represents a comment on a commit or issue

created_at.description: The time of the comment's creation

html_url.description: The HTML URL of the comment

issue_url.description: The HTML URL of the issue if the comment is posted on an issue, else empty string

original_author.description: The original author that posted the comment if it was not posted locally, else empty string

original_author_id.description: The ID of the original author that posted the comment if it was not posted locally, else 0

pull_request_url.description: The HTML URL of the pull request if the comment is posted on a pull request, else empty string

updated_at.description: The time of the comment's update
